description: Manufacturing user follows least privilege and has recently used access keys.
business_context: Used by a manufacturing operator to access approved production reports.

description: Manufacturing IAM user does not have admin access, but the access key is old and should be rotated.
business_context: Used by reporting scripts to access manufacturing quality reports.

description: Dangerous IAM misconfiguration. A non-admin manufacturing user has AdministratorAccess and an old access key.
business_context: Temporary manufacturing support user that should not have full administrator permissions.
